summary: A solid audience recording captured with Sennheiser 421s; the show is praised as a good performance.
review: The reviewer highlights that the audience tapes, especially Gans' Sennheiser 421 capture, deliver clear and enjoyable sound. Both the performance and the audio quality are described as good, making this a recommendable listen despite the lack of detailed song commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 ★) which is positive about both sound and performance; rating reflects a generally good show with decent audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice audience captures; Sennheiser 421 microphones provide clear capture, noted as slightly ahead of other tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed commentary on set structure.
